targets.notes: Agent Skills compatible; in-repo skills/ when --scope workspace
Antigravity CLI may use ~/.gemini/antigravity-cli/skills/ on some versions

targets.manualReason: No local skills folder — use Custom GPT, Projects, or per-chat paste
printSteps: Custom GPT: paste arabic/SKILL.md body into the system prompt; upload arabic/references/*.md and arabic/dialects/*.md as Knowledge files (subject to upload limits).
ChatGPT Projects: paste SKILL.md into project instructions; upload reference packs as project files.
Per-conversation: paste SKILL.md at chat start — large reference packs may not fit; prefer Custom GPT or Projects.
Escape hatch: clone this repo and copy arabic/ manually; there is no filesystem install path for ChatGPT.

targets.manualReason: No verified global skills folder — use repo docs and --dir
printSteps: Clone mediabubble-adv/arabic-skill or run from a local checkout.
Add arabic/SKILL.md and key references to your repo docs (e.g. AGENTS.md, CONVENTIONS.md) per Aider startup conventions.
Use: npx @mediabubble-adv/arabic-skill@latest install --dir <your-skills-or-docs-path> if your setup has a skills directory.
See docs/supported/aider/README.md for CLI wrapper and command-tree packaging.

targets.manualReason: No verified global skills folder — adapter + workspace conventions
printSteps: Clone mediabubble-adv/arabic-skill or use a local checkout.
Package via Amp adapter/workspace conventions documented in docs/supported/amp/README.md.
Use: npx @mediabubble-adv/arabic-skill@latest install --dir <path> when you have a confirmed skills root.
Load SKILL.md progressively; map /arabic subcommands via prompt convention until native routing is tested.

targets.manualReason: No verified global skills folder — .clinerules + repo docs
printSteps: Clone mediabubble-adv/arabic-skill or use a local checkout.
Copy arabic/ into your project and wire .clinerules / Cline rules per docs/supported/cline/README.md.
Use: npx @mediabubble-adv/arabic-skill@latest install --dir <path> if Cline exposes a skills directory on your version.
Command tree works via prompt convention; native /arabic routing may vary by Cline version.

targets.manualReason: No verified global skills folder — local config + repo context
printSteps: Clone mediabubble-adv/arabic-skill or use a local checkout.
Add SKILL.md and selected references via Continue config and repo docs (see docs/supported/continue/README.md).
Use: npx @mediabubble-adv/arabic-skill@latest install --dir <path> when you have a confirmed skills root.
Map /arabic commands through prompt wrappers; subagents are limited on Continue.

targets.manualReason: No verified global skills folder — custom instructions + repo docs
printSteps: Clone mediabubble-adv/arabic-skill or use a local checkout.
Paste or reference SKILL.md via Copilot custom instructions and repo-local documentation.
Use: npx @mediabubble-adv/arabic-skill@latest install --dir <path> if your Copilot setup supports a skills folder.
See docs/supported/copilot/README.md for instruction packaging.

targets.manualReason: No verified global skills folder — system instructions + prompt files
printSteps: Clone mediabubble-adv/arabic-skill or use a local checkout.
Load SKILL.md via Gemini system instructions or project prompt files (see docs/supported/gemini/README.md).
For Antigravity IDE with native skills: npx @mediabubble-adv/arabic-skill@latest install --target antigravity
Use --dir <path> when you have a confirmed skills root for your Gemini surface.

targets.manualReason: No verified global skills folder — IDE-specific instructions
printSteps: Clone mediabubble-adv/arabic-skill or use a local checkout.
Wire SKILL.md through Junie / JetBrains AI project instructions per docs/supported/jetbrains-junie/README.md.
Use: npx @mediabubble-adv/arabic-skill@latest install --dir <path> if your Junie version exposes a skills directory.
Validate how Junie consumes project instructions before claiming full command routing.

targets.manualReason: No verified global skills folder — local rules/docs + adapter
printSteps: Clone mediabubble-adv/arabic-skill or use a local checkout.
Package via Kilo Code local config and docs per docs/supported/kilo-code/README.md.
Use: npx @mediabubble-adv/arabic-skill@latest install --dir <path> when you have a confirmed skills root.
Map /arabic via prompt convention until hands-on adapter testing is complete.

targets.manualReason: No verified global skills folder — steering/spec/workflow docs
printSteps: Clone mediabubble-adv/arabic-skill or use a local checkout.
Integrate SKILL.md via Kiro steering, spec, or workflow docs (see docs/supported/kiro/README.md).
Use: npx @mediabubble-adv/arabic-skill@latest install --dir <path> if Kiro exposes a skills directory.
Command routing is prompt-conventional until native support is verified.

targets.manualReason: No verified global skills folder — platform/SDK adapter
printSteps: Clone mediabubble-adv/arabic-skill or use a local checkout.
Package through OpenHands platform/SDK layers per docs/supported/openhands/README.md.
Use: npx @mediabubble-adv/arabic-skill@latest install --dir <path> when you have a confirmed skills root.
Subagents and workflows map well but need tool-specific adapter wiring.

targets.manualReason: No verified global skills folder — system prompt/API wrapper
printSteps: Clone mediabubble-adv/arabic-skill or use a local checkout.
Load SKILL.md via Qwen system prompt or API wrapper (see docs/supported/qwen/README.md).
Use: npx @mediabubble-adv/arabic-skill@latest install --dir <path> if your Qwen setup has a skills directory.
Full advisory-agent model needs a wrapper; core writing behavior works via instructions.

targets.manualReason: No verified global skills folder — Replit Agent skills/docs
printSteps: Clone mediabubble-adv/arabic-skill or use a local checkout.
Add arabic/ to your Replit project per Agent skills/docs conventions (see docs/supported/replit/README.md).
Use: npx @mediabubble-adv/arabic-skill@latest install --dir <path> inside your Repl when a skills root is confirmed.
Staged project workflows may need explicit prompts for /arabic subcommands.

targets.manualReason: No verified global skills folder — repo context + instruction wrapper
printSteps: Clone mediabubble-adv/arabic-skill or use a local checkout.
Wire SKILL.md through Cody repo context and instruction wrappers (see docs/supported/sourcegraph-cody/README.md).
Use: npx @mediabubble-adv/arabic-skill@latest install --dir <path> if Cody exposes a skills directory on your version.
Command routing is partial — prefer repo-local docs for stable behavior.

targets.manualReason: No verified global skills folder — extension-dependent
printSteps: Clone mediabubble-adv/arabic-skill or use a local checkout.
Install via your VS Code AI extension's skills/instructions path (see docs/supported/vs-code/README.md).
Use: npx @mediabubble-adv/arabic-skill@latest install --dir <path> once you confirm the extension's skills directory.
Capabilities vary by extension — validate custom instructions support first.

targets.manualReason: No verified global skills folder — rules + docs + command conventions
printSteps: Clone mediabubble-adv/arabic-skill or use a local checkout.
Package via Windsurf rules, docs, and command conventions (see docs/supported/windsurf/README.md).
Use: npx @mediabubble-adv/arabic-skill@latest install --dir <path> when you have a confirmed skills root.
Do not guess ~/.windsurf/skills — add a verified path to the profile before using a preset.

targets.manualReason: No verified global skills folder — ACP/agent adapter + project docs
printSteps: Clone mediabubble-adv/arabic-skill or use a local checkout.
Wire SKILL.md via Zed ACP/agent adapter and project docs (see docs/supported/zed/README.md).
Use: npx @mediabubble-adv/arabic-skill@latest install --dir <path> if Zed exposes a skills directory.
Subagents map well but need adapter-specific packaging.
